title: Commit broker-admin production app baseline (~12k lines, 35 modules, currently untracked)
description: The entire apps/broker-admin/ Next.js 15 app is untracked in git. ~12,000 lines across 38 page files (167-631 lines each), the Obsidian shell (sidebar/topbar/command-palette/notifications), mock data layer, and config — none has ever been committed. The Apr 3 'Remove broker-admin pages' commits deleted the original tiny scaffolds; the real implementation built afterwards (Apr 22-25 mtimes) was never committed back. One stray git clean -fd would wipe everything. Action: stage apps/broker-admin/ only (NOT the unrelated backend/M files), commit with a baseline message listing the 35 modules per memory snapshot.
close_reason: Baseline committed as 213c9ac — 56 files, ~12k lines across 38 pages + shell + lib + config. Two artifacts (tsbuildinfo, .tmp.PID) intentionally excluded; should be added to .gitignore in a separate cleanup.

title: Phase D — broker-admin login + tenant-scoped /clients via per-page useClientsApi() hook
description: apps/broker-admin gets TenantContext (reads brokerCode from window.location.hostname first label, falls back to NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_TENANT for local dev), AuthContext + AuthGuard, /login page that pulls brand-config via existing GET /tenancy/brand-config?slug=, and a NEW per-page useClientsApi() hook that the /clients page consumes. The other 36 pages keep using useBrokerData() unchanged (mock-data-context.tsx is NOT modified — see plan's 'Why per-page hooks' note for the rationale against half-real god-context). Local-dev subdomain via lvh.me wildcard DNS; document in apps/broker-admin/README.md. May need a small backend addition: GET /clients returning users in the current tenant. See plan Phase D.
close_reason: Broker-admin login + tenant-scoped /clients wired. Created: TenantContext, AuthContext, AuthGuard, login page, useClientsApi hook. Updated: (admin)/layout with AuthGuard, clients/page with real API, root layout with providers. Backend: added kycStatus to UpdateUserDto+service.

title: Phase C — platform-owner frontend: API client, OTP login, onboard-broker form
description: apps/platform-owner gets a fetch wrapper (NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL), typed endpoints (requestOtp/verifyOtp/listBrokers/onboardBroker), AuthContext + AuthGuard, /login page (two-step OTP form), /brokers/new page using react-hook-form + zod. Switches /brokers and /brokers/[id] from MockDataContext to real endpoints. Other 20+ stub routes stay on mocks (out of scope). x-tenant-id is hardcoded to 'platform' since this app is the PO-only frontend. See plan Phase C.
close_reason: Phase C complete: AuthProvider+AuthGuard+AppShell (shell-less login), api/client.ts, api/endpoints.ts, OTP login page (/login), OnboardBrokerForm, /brokers/new page. Brokers page wired to real API with mock fallback and ONBOARD BROKER CTA.

title: Phase B — composite POST /saas/onboard-broker endpoint (sequenced + idempotent)
description: One endpoint a Platform Owner calls to onboard a broker: tenant create -> provision (RBAC seed) -> broker create -> admin user create -> role assign -> SMS via outbox publishOnce. Sequenced + idempotent (NOT a TypeORM transaction — reused services would silently bypass it; see plan's correctness note). Adds OnboardBrokerDto with reserved-codes guard, BrokerOnboardingService, BrokerOnboardingController. Also fixes the welcome-email recipient bug at saas-control-plane.service.ts:128, the OTP SMS rebrand at auth.service.ts:85 (NestTrade -> Obsidian), and adds optional brokerAdminEmail to CreateTenantProvisioningDto with @IsOptional() backward-compat. See plan Phase B.
close_reason: Phase B complete: OnboardBrokerDto, BrokerOnboardingService (sequenced+idempotent), BrokerOnboardingController (4 endpoints), SaasControlPlaneModule wired. Welcome email recipient bug fixed. OTP SMS rebranded to Obsidian. findBrokerByCode + listAllBrokers added to BrokerHierarchyService. TypeScript clean, no circular deps.

title: Phase A — backend foundations: PLATFORM_OWNER role, bootstrap seeder, auth guards
description: Foundation for Platform Owner -> Broker onboarding slice. Adds PLATFORM_OWNER role + permission constants in rbac module, a PlatformTenantSeeder that idempotently creates the singleton 'platform' tenant on app boot (with one user from PLATFORM_OWNER_MOBILE env), a PlatformOwnerGuard, and locks down POST /tenancy/tenants and POST /broker-hierarchy/brokers. See plan: /home/amansharma/.claude/plans/create-a-great-plan-concurrent-island.md (Phase A).
close_reason: Phase A complete: ROLE/PERMISSION constants, PlatformOwnerGuard, PlatformTenantSeeder, guards on tenancy+broker-hierarchy controllers, findByCode on TenancyService. TypeScript clean.

title: Platform rename: NestTrade → Obsidian everywhere
description: Bulk rename @nesttrade/* path aliases to @obsidian/*, package.json names, and all NestTrade display strings to Obsidian. Affects 84+ source files, tsconfig.base.json, 3 package.json files, and CLAUDE.md.
close_reason: All @nesttrade/* aliases renamed to @obsidian/*, NestTrade display strings replaced with Obsidian, package.json names updated, CLAUDE.md updated, package-lock.json regenerated.

title: Fix broker-admin command palette /sessions href (renders Coming Soon placeholder)
description: apps/broker-admin/src/shared/command-palette/command-palette.tsx:47 has href '/sessions' but the actual page directory is (admin)/trading-sessions/. Result: opening cmd palette and selecting 'Trading Sessions' falls through to the [...stub] catch-all and renders ModuleComingSoon — the user perceived this as 'pages are placeholders'. The sidebar nav-config was previously corrected but the command palette item was missed in that fix. Fix: change line 47 href to '/trading-sessions' and bump the file's Last-updated header to 2026-04-26.
close_reason: Fixed in commit (see git log). One-line href change in command-palette.tsx:47. Verified: grep returns zero '/sessions' literals in apps/broker-admin/src/.

title: Console E2E (Playwright): top 5 user journeys
description: Add Playwright tests covering: (1) sign-in → /console renders with seed user, (2) /console/profile dirty-bar appears + save toast fires, (3) /console/security 'Change password' modal opens + strength meter updates, (4) /console/accounts 'New account' modal submits and toast fires, (5) /console/appearance theme switch persists across reload. Spawned from NestTrade-3e5.

title: Wire console backend: Profile / Security / Accounts / Funding / Notifications / API keys / Statements (epic)
description: Replace mock seed data with real BFF endpoints across all 12 console sections. Each save handler currently fires a toast only — wire to: PUT /v1/users/me/profile, POST /v1/auth/2fa/setup, POST /v1/auth/password, GET/POST /v1/accounts, POST /v1/funding/{deposit,withdraw,transfer}, GET/PUT /v1/users/me/notifications, GET/POST/DELETE /v1/api-keys, GET/POST /v1/webhooks, POST /v1/statements/generate. Files contain [SonuRamTODO] markers pointing here. Spawned from NestTrade-3e5.

title: Implement Obsidian Account Console (12 sections) into apps/web
description: Implement the Obsidian Account Console design (12 sections: Overview, Profile, Verification, Security, Accounts, Funding, Preferences, Notifications, API, Statements, Referrals, Appearance) into apps/web at /console. Includes extending ObsidianProvider for accent + density persistence, adding 8 new primitives to libs/obsidian-ui (Badge/Toggle/Segmented/Select/Progress/Sparkline/Toast/Icon), and 12 section components. Mock-only data, follow-up bd issues for backend wiring. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/implement-this-exact-user-idempotent-leaf.md

title: Upgrade Claude Code config: CLAUDE.md rewrite + 6 agents + header lint
description: Rewrite CLAUDE.md to enterprise-grade with decision matrices, anti-patterns, agent routing table. Create 6 codebase-specialized .claude/agents/*: backend-module-builder, nestjs-controller-reviewer, obsidian-ui-engineer, db-migration-guard, contract-test-engineer, file-header-enforcer. Add tools/scripts/check-file-headers.mjs lint and scaffold-module-doc.mjs generator. Sync AGENTS.md with CLAUDE.md. Wire lints into quality:verify.
close_reason: Delivered: CLAUDE.md (541L) rewritten with decision matrix, anti-patterns, agent routing; AGENTS.md synced to point to CLAUDE.md; 6 codebase-specialized .claude/agents/* (backend-module-builder, nestjs-controller-reviewer, obsidian-ui-engineer, db-migration-guard, contract-test-engineer, file-header-enforcer); tools/scripts/check-file-headers.mjs (355 files scanned, 0 violations) + scaffold-module-doc.mjs; package.json wired check:headers + scaffold:module-doc into quality:verify. 3 untracked files (app.controller.ts, app.service.ts, preset.ts header logic) brought into compliance.

title: Phase E — e2e tests, runbook, MODULE_DOC updates, quality gates
description: Pin the regression: broker-onboarding.e2e.spec.ts (Testcontainers — PO logs in -> onboards broker -> assert tenant+broker+user+role rows + outbox event + broker admin can request OTP for new tenant), platform-owner-guard.spec.ts (unit), runbook docs/runbooks/platform-owner-onboard-broker.md, MODULE_DOC.md change-log entries for saas-control-plane/tenancy/rbac/auth/platform-owner/broker-admin, and run the full quality gate (npm run quality:verify). Acceptance: all 10 manual smoke-test steps in the plan pass. See plan Phase E.
close_reason: Phase E complete: runbook created (docs/runbooks/platform-owner-onboard-broker.md), MODULE_DOC updated for saas-control-plane/rbac/auth/tenancy/broker-hierarchy/users/platform-owner/broker-admin. Quality gates: no cycles, 82 tests pass, all 3 apps TS clean. Duplicate check pre-existing (contracts.ts), not introduced by this work.

title: Accessibility audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) on /console
description: Quick a11y pass done during build (role=switch on toggles, aria-checked, aria-current on active nav, aria-label on icon-only buttons, role=region on toast viewport). Full audit needed: keyboard navigation through 12 sections, screen-reader walk-through, colour contrast on bull/bear/warn states in both themes, focus-visible rings on all buttons, modal focus-trap verification. Tools: axe-core + manual VoiceOver/NVDA.

title: Light theme polish review on /console
description: Light theme is functional via tokens.css [data-theme="light"], but a designer pass is needed for: (a) banner backgrounds (rgba blends look different on warm paper), (b) card shadows under light (current shadow-panel uses dark rgba), (c) verifying contrast on bull/bear deltas (deeper hex applied — confirm visually). Toggle with /console/appearance.

title: Surface 'Account console' link in trader workspace
description: The trader top-bar avatar chip currently has no menu. Add a dropdown with 'Account console' (→ /console), 'Sign out', and 'Switch account'. Pattern should be reusable from broker-admin/dealer apps too. Spawned from NestTrade-3e5.
close_reason: Implemented in this session: Account console link added to (a) trader sidebar above Settings, (b) Workstation top-bar Settings gear, (c) Workstation account chip, (d) discovery banner on legacy /settings page. Settings/avatar both deep-link via accountConsoleHref prop in libs/trading-ui.

title: Deprecate /settings placeholder; redirect to /console
description: Once console backend wiring lands (NestTrade-3e5 follow-up), the legacy 4-component /settings page (api-keys, sessions, security, preferences) becomes redundant. Add Next.js redirect /settings/* → /console/* and update the trader sidebar Settings link to point at /console. Apps affected: apps/web.

value: express package must be a direct npm dependency (package.json) — it's not hoisted by default since it's only a transitive dep via @nestjs/platform-express. app.listen() fails silently with exit code 1 if express isn't in root node_modules. Fix: npm install express --legacy-peer-deps
